prompt: Scene/backdrop: an airy contemporary living room with floor-to-ceiling windows showcasing a sunlit garden in full bloom. Subject: a selection of bouclé and velvet cushions in ivory and charcoal, artistically arranged on a modern sofa. Composition/framing: wide-angle shot, sofa positioned slightly off-centre, focusing on the interplay of light and texture. Lighting/mood: natural morning light streaming in, creating lively contrasts and dappled patterns on the cushions. Materials/textures: bouclé cushion, velvet cushion, brushed cotton fabric of the sofa, polished concrete floor. Style/medium: contemporary luxury editorial home lifestyle photography, shot on medium format digital. Lighting/mood: controlled directional lighting with warm accents, sophisticated and inviting atmosphere. Color palette: deep charcoal and ivory contrast with brushed brass details. Materials/textures: bouclé, ribbed faux fur, polished concrete, sculptural forms. Composition: gallery-curated minimalist framing. Constraints: no text, no logos, no watermarks, premium quality feel.
title: A Breath of Fresh Air within Four Walls
caption:
Feel the spring breeze indoors with our chic cushion collection, bringing a touch of nature-inspired elegance to your home.

#PremiumComfort #SpringDecor #LuxuryLiving #BoucléBeauty #HomeInspiration
